dp_quest_start.strong: YES! The Shimmer Crystal is waiting — let's go!
dp_quest_start.partial: Whenever you're ready, I'll be right here.
dp_quest_start.poor: No rush. Adventures start with a hello.
dp_quest_start.timeout: Take your time. I'm right here with you.
dp_quest_start.safety: Let's keep our adventure safe and kind. A grown-up can help if you need.

dp_investigate.strong: Thank you for looking with me. Checking helps the scary stories get smaller.
dp_investigate.partial: One careful look still counts. Want to check another clue?
dp_investigate.poor: We can look together. Wize says noticing is what Guardian Dragons do.
dp_investigate.timeout: No rush. Feelings are big sometimes — we can sit with that.
dp_investigate.safety: If something feels really hard, a trusted grown-up can help. You're not alone.

dp_fact_sort.strong: You found the story! I tell LOTS of stories — but now we know which one wasn't a fact.
dp_fact_sort.partial: Hmm… that one might be a fact or a maybe. Which thought says WILL — like it's already decided?
dp_fact_sort.poor: Stories aren't bad. Let's try once more: which thought is the scary story?
dp_fact_sort.timeout: Thinking takes a minute. I'm with you.
dp_fact_sort.safety: If worries feel too big, a trusted grown-up can help sort them.

dp_breathe.strong: I still feel nervous… and my body feels softer. Thank you.
dp_breathe.poor: Breathing is hard when sparks fly. Let's try one slow breath together.
dp_breathe.timeout: Big feelings need a minute. I'm right here.
dp_breathe.safety: If your body feels unsafe, find a trusted grown-up right away.

dp_choose_path.strong: Okay… one careful step. I'm holding on — and I'm coming with you.
dp_choose_path.partial: We can always go back. But if we never cross, we'll never discover whether my worry was right this time. Want one careful step together?
dp_choose_path.poor: You're the boss of this choice. I'll stay close either way.
dp_choose_path.safety: You're safe here. A grown-up is always there if you need extra help.

dp_crossing.strong: I thought we couldn't… but we did. Thank you for helping me.
dp_crossing.partial: Creak… we're doing it. One more plank!
dp_crossing.poor: Every step counts. Let's take the next one together.
dp_crossing.timeout: One careful plank at a time.
dp_crossing.safety: You're safe here. A grown-up can help if fear feels too big.

dp_leftout_bench.strong: You made room for Jamie — belonging starts with one kind invite.
dp_leftout_bench.partial: Sitting nearby helps. A short invitation can open the door even more.
dp_leftout_bench.poor: We can turn back and try a welcome. Friendship grows in the retry.
dp_leftout_bench.timeout: Noticing is the first step. I'm with you.
dp_leftout_bench.safety: If loneliness feels too big, a trusted grown-up can help.

dp_ask_grownup.strong: Asking a grown-up for help is brave — that keeps everyone safer.
dp_ask_grownup.partial: Starting small is okay. Sharing with a grown-up is another brave option.
dp_ask_grownup.poor: Hurts shouldn't stay secret. Trusted grown-ups are part of the team.
dp_ask_grownup.timeout: You can take your time choosing what to share.
dp_ask_grownup.safety: Hard feelings get help. You're not alone.

dp_hothead_calm.strong: Breathing first gives big feelings a soft landing.
dp_hothead_calm.partial: Space can be kind — checking back later completes the care.
dp_hothead_calm.poor: Shame heats anger up. Calm words help the fire cool.
dp_hothead_calm.timeout: Big feelings need a minute. I'm right here.
dp_hothead_calm.safety: If anger feels unsafe, find a trusted grown-up right away.

dp_friendship_repair.strong: Repair restores belonging — that was a strong friendship move.
dp_friendship_repair.partial: Timing matters. Keeping the door open is still friendship.
dp_friendship_repair.poor: Exclusion isn't repair. Let's try a kinder invitation.
dp_friendship_repair.timeout: Friendships can pause and restart gently.
dp_friendship_repair.safety: If a conflict still hurts, a grown-up can help you both.
